cards.title: Add CLAUDE.md to UKCAUD Spec Studio
cards.body: Project is in Building phase with active batch-parallel execution, but no local CLAUDE.md to document SE Builder form ingestion constraints, monorepo DSL compatibility expectations, or schema version governance. This creates context loss when switching between UKCAUD, caseware/code, and productivity-tool work. Add a project-level CLAUDE.md with ingestion rules, test matrix (DSL versions × form types), and rollback procedures.

cards.title: Audit Zod schema relaxations for validation gaps
cards.body: Commit 0ff2a14 relaxed Zod schemas to match real monorepo DSL shapes, but lacks inline documentation of what changed and why. If schemas became too permissive, malformed forms could slip into the spec. Audit the specific field relaxations (check git diff on that commit), add TypeScript comments documenting the tradeoff, and verify no new error-silent codepaths exist.

cards.title: Resolve 3 TODO/FIXME markers before batch 2
cards.body: 3 TODO/FIXME markers scattered across the codebase. With batch 1 complete and tests green, clear these now rather than letting them compound during batch 2. Search the codebase (grep TODO, FIXME), assess if each is blocking or can be deferred, and either fix or convert to tracked issues.

cards.title: Add integration tests for dotfiles sync
cards.body: Currently 55 config files are synced across machines with zero test coverage. A bad config sync could break VS Code, Claude Code, or Git across all synced machines. Add tests that verify JSON/YAML/shell syntax validity after pull, and simulate the sync pipeline to catch breaks before deployment.

cards.title: Pre-sync validation layer
cards.body: Implement config validation before syncing: parse JSON settings files, validate shell script syntax, check YAML in config files. Reject invalid configs and log detailed error messages so users can fix the source before resync.

cards.title: Add Comprehensive Test Suite
cards.body: 54-file spec validation platform with zero test coverage is a critical reliability gap. Validation logic in backend/services/cw_api.py and Excel parsing need unit tests to ensure correctness. Frontend spec upload and validation UI also need React Testing Library coverage. Recommended approach: add pytest to backend, Jest to frontend, establish coverage threshold (80%+ minimum for validators).

cards.title: Release Changelog and Establish Cadence
cards.body: 26 pending changelog entries accumulated over 13 days (from 2026-04-09). Publishing schedule has drifted. Consolidate CHANGELOG-PENDING.md into CHANGELOG.md, tag a version, and establish weekly release cadence aligned with sprint rhythm or feature completion.

cards.title: Add test coverage for multi-session Express + WebSocket server
cards.body: The claude-mobile dashboard has 6 source files with zero test files. For a system managing multi-session state and real-time WebSocket communication, this is a reliability risk. Prioritize endpoint tests (session CRUD, WebSocket connection/disconnect) and at least one integration test validating session persistence across connections.

cards.title: Missing README for onboarding materials
cards.body: Onboarding project has 5 source files (presentation, dashboard, guides, exercises) but no README explaining structure or usage. This is critical for discoverability and user onboarding. Add README with file descriptions, entry points (presentation.js, dashboard.html), and intended audience.

cards.title: No CLAUDE.md context file
cards.body: Active project lacks CLAUDE.md to document purpose, content architecture, and maintenance guidelines. Recent file deletion (ibp-exercise/CLAUDE-VSCODE-USER-GUIDE.md) suggests evolving structure — document decisions to preserve context.

cards.title: Add test coverage for feedback widget
cards.body: Widget has 0 test files. Add unit tests for render, user interactions (submit, cancel), and API endpoints. Integration tests should verify communication with UKCAS/UKCAUD audit workflows. This is production-facing UI and must be reliable.

cards.title: Create CLAUDE.md with project context
cards.body: No CLAUDE.md exists. Document feedback widget purpose, Replit deployment setup, Jira automation integration, and the productivity-tool dependency. Include auth model decision (why Replit privacy over code-level gating). Helps future developers and coordinates with your global rules.

cards.title: Clarify and document codebase structure
cards.body: With only 1 source file, the architecture is unclear. Confirm whether this is complete, a monorepo reference, or if code is generated elsewhere. Add a README explaining the feedback widget's role in the UKCAUD audit workflow and how it communicates with dependencies.

cards.title: Establish test coverage for Release Notes Tool
cards.body: Zero tests exist for 11 source files in a user-facing tool. This is a critical gap. Start with tests for core release note generation logic and API endpoints. Adopt TDD going forward to prevent regression and document intended behavior.

cards.title: Add test coverage for PPTX generation
cards.body: 6 source files, 0 tests — no validation that the core output (PowerPoint presentations) is correctly formatted, branded, or structured. This is particularly risky for a code generation tool. Set up jest, add tests that validate slide counts, Caseware branding tokens (colors, fonts), and XML structure integrity.

cards.title: Publish stale changelog entries
cards.body: 7 items in CHANGELOG-PENDING.md have been aging for 13 days without publication. Either consolidate into CHANGELOG.md or remove if already shipped. Prevents future changelog bloat and keeps release notes current.

cards.title: Add CLAUDE.md and scope documentation
cards.body: Repository initialized but lacks project context. Add CLAUDE.md defining: (1) whether this documents SDK, API, or both; (2) target audience; (3) maintenance cadence. Add README with directory layout and coverage scope. This unblocks content population.

cards.title: Repository setup incomplete
cards.body: The Activepieces clone has zero source files and no package.json, suggesting the repository initialization is incomplete or the codebase wasn't cloned properly. Verify the clone contains the full source tree (packages/, integrations/, etc.) and run npm install to restore node_modules. If this is a deliberate fresh start, document the rationale in CLAUDE.md.

cards.title: Add project context and development guide
cards.body: With 280+ integrations and a complex plugin architecture, Activepieces requires clear documentation of how to extend and test locally. Create CLAUDE.md with: architecture overview, integration development workflow, testing strategy, and contribution checklist. Reference the main repo's CONTRIBUTING.md if forking.

cards.title: Add test coverage for spec validation
cards.body: 36 source files with zero tests creates risk that spec changes silently break agent workflows or compliance rules. Recommend starting with unit tests for critical paths: spec parsing, validation rules, and audit trail generation. Consider using a test framework appropriate for spec validation (Jest, Mocha, or domain-specific validator).

cards.title: Document spec layer architecture and integrations
cards.body: The spec layer appears to be a foundation for audit/compliance automation but lacks documented interfaces. Add README with: data model overview, integration points with UKCAS/UKCAUD systems, agent responsibilities, and validation guarantees. This prevents misuse downstream.

cards.title: Establish test coverage for dashboard API and components
cards.body: Only 1 of 95 source files has tests. Critical paths (/api/execute route, CalendarPanel, TimeTracker, CeremoniesTab) are unprotected. This is a production safety gap and blocks confident refactoring. Priority: add integration tests for the execute endpoint and unit tests for complex components.

cards.title: Consolidate and publish changelog backlog
cards.body: CHANGELOG-PENDING.md has 143 unpublished entries from 5 days ago. Per git-workflow hooks rules, these should be published into CHANGELOG.md immediately and hook enforcement activated. Clears technical debt and unblocks EOD sync workflows.

cards.title: Add unit tests for critical automation paths
cards.body: Automation tool with 7.5% test coverage (3/40 files) is at risk of silent failures. PowerShell scripts for Dekka digest and scheduled tasks have zero tests. Target 20% coverage: add fixtures for file I/O, mock Jira API responses, and validate sprint data transformations. This protects daily syncs from breaking undetected.

cards.title: Consolidate stale CHANGELOG-PENDING.md entries
cards.body: Two entries have been pending for 6 days (since 2026-04-16). Daily eod sync commits are running, but changelog consolidation hook is not. Merge pending entries into CHANGELOG.md now, then fix the pre-commit hook to enforce consolidation on next eod sync.

cards.title: Zero Test Coverage on 94 Source Files
cards.body: Property Search Tool has no test suite despite heavy reliance on web scraping and financial calculations. Recent features (feedback widget, auth gate) added without tests. Scraper is fragile to Rightmove DOM changes; financial logic has no regression tests. Recommend starting with pytest fixtures for mock Rightmove responses and unit tests for analysis.py before next release.

cards.title: Stale Changelog (31 Days)
cards.body: CHANGELOG-PENDING.md has 2 unpublished entries from ~March 22. Release process appears blocked or manual. Establish automated release cadence (every 2 weeks) tied to git tags and consolidate pending entries into CHANGELOG.md.

cards.title: Add Test Coverage for Review Phase
cards.body: 51 source files with 0 tests blocks Review phase completion. Python backend (main.py) and Next.js frontend both untested. Start with pytest suite for backend routes and React Testing Library for critical UI paths. Target 60%+ coverage on business logic before release.

cards.title: Resolve Auth Strategy Churn
cards.body: Auth middleware was added (75f8ef9), removed (a69ff8c), then re-added (96d0458) in recent commits. Current state uses 'Replit publish privacy instead' per latest messages. Document final decision, remove dead code paths, and add a comment explaining why middleware was deprioritized.

cards.title: Consolidate changelog (13 days overdue)
cards.body: 6 unpublished entries in CHANGELOG-PENDING.md dating back 13 days. Per hooks protocol in CLAUDE.md, changelog consolidation should occur with each commit batch. Consolidate into CHANGELOG.md and verify all recent workflow/template changes are documented.

cards.title: Add README.md documenting Yearly Reviews purpose and structure
cards.body: Missing README.md is blocking clarity on this project's role. Document: (1) the purpose of Yearly Reviews in your workflow, (2) what each of the 4 source files does, (3) how to run or contribute to the review process. This is foundational context for resuming the project later.

cards.title: Add test suite for scraper and auth
cards.body: Zero tests for a production tool handling Google News session cookies and Replit password auth (auth-gate.js, scripts/scrape-gnews.js). Recent auth changes (2026-04-20) are untested. Add unit tests for session validation, scraper data parsing, and fallback logic. Aim for 80%+ coverage per your coding rules.

cards.title: Consolidate changelog (14 days stale)
cards.body: CHANGELOG-PENDING.md has 20 unpublished entries aged since ~2026-04-08. Per your documentation-with-commits hook protocol, consolidate into CHANGELOG.md before next git push. This is blocking your pre-commit-doc-check.

cards.title: Publish stale changelog entries
cards.body: 6 changelog entries have been pending for 13 days. Either merge them into CHANGELOG.md to document the feedback widget and auth gate changes, or confirm those changes were reverted and the entries should be discarded. Stale changelogs can mask what's actually deployed.
